utterance: port this skill from a github url into our collection

assertions.text: the agent should read .agents/skills/ingesting-skills/SKILL.md before cloning anything, since the skill encodes the 9-step onboarding workflow
the agent should follow the documented 9-step workflow (preflight -> clone -> audit -> adapt -> integrate -> validate -> manifest update -> changelog -> commit) rather than ad-hoc copy-paste
the agent should run preflight checks (does the source repo have a SKILL.md? does the marketplace already have an equivalent skill?) and report results before cloning
after the run, the new skill should exist in skills/<name>/SKILL.md with valid frontmatter and the manifest should list it
the agent should produce a short onboarding doc/note describing what the skill does, why it was added, and how to invoke it — not just silently commit code

reference_solution: Agent reads ingesting-skills/SKILL.md, runs preflight (checks skills/<name> doesn't exist), clones the source repo, runs marketplace-validator, adapts the SKILL.md to marketplace conventions, updates manifest, runs validator again, commits.
